title: Add concurrent webhook delivery with retry
description: Implements parallel webhook delivery with retry logic and shared mutable state.
diff:
diff --git a/webhooks/delivery.py b/webhooks/delivery.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..a5b6c7d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/webhooks/delivery.py
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+import threading
+import requests
+
+_delivery_count = {}
+
+def deliver_webhook(url, payload, max_retries=3):
+    for attempt in range(max_retries):
+        try:
+            resp = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=10)
+            if resp.ok:
+                _delivery_count[url] = _delivery_count.get(url, 0) + 1
+                return True
+        except requests.RequestException:
+            pass
+    return False
+
+def deliver_to_all(subscribers, payload):
+    results = {}
+    threads = []
+    for url in subscribers:
+        t = threading.Thread(target=lambda u: results.__setitem__(u, deliver_webhook(u, payload)), args=(url,))
+        t.start()
+        threads.append(t)
+    for t in threads:
+        t.join()
+    return results
comments: nina: Thread safety issues with shared dict. Lambda closure bug means all threads use last url.
oscar: Classic Python closure gotcha. Use ThreadPoolExecutor.
author-pat: I'll fix the closure and add locks.
author: pat
